items.title: Bitcoin stalls at $76K: Key BTC price levels to watch ahead of FOMC
items.summary: Bitcoin price traded at $74,000 as investors braced for Jerome Powell’s post-FOMC speech that could see volatile swings toward key BTC price levels.
items.title_cn: 比特币停滞在7.6万美元：FOMC会议前需关注的关键BTC价格水平
items.summary_cn: 比特币价格交易于7.4万美元附近，投资者正为杰罗姆·鲍威尔在FOMC会议后的讲话做准备，这可能导致比特币价格向关键水平剧烈波动。

items.title: Bitcoin ETF inflow streak nears October run, but totals still lag
items.summary: US spot Bitcoin ETFs draw $1.2 billion over seven days, far short of October 2025’s nine-day $6 billion streak, as XRP ETFs turn green.
items.title_cn: 比特币ETF资金流入连续天数接近十月纪录，但总额仍落后
items.summary_cn: 美国现货比特币ETF在七天内吸引12亿美元资金，远低于2025年十月连续九天60亿美元的纪录，而XRP ETF已转为净流入。

items.title: Bitcoin inflows to exchanges spike as BTC hits resistance at $75K
items.summary: Spikes in large deposits to exchanges have been associated with increased selling pressure, according to analysts at CryptoQuant.
items.title_cn: 比特币触及7.5万美元阻力位，交易所流入量激增
items.summary_cn: CryptoQuant分析师指出，交易所大额存款激增通常与抛售压力增加相关。

items.title: Bitcoin holds $70K, bringing spot ETF buyers close to breakeven: Is the bull market back?
items.summary: A Bitcoin price rally to $80,000 would bring the bulk of spot BTC ETF holders to breakeven on their positions and possibly signal the resumption of the crypto bull market.
items.title_cn: 比特币守住7万美元关口，现货ETF买家接近盈亏平衡：牛市回归了吗？
items.summary_cn: 若比特币价格反弹至8万美元，将使大部分现货BTC ETF持有者达到盈亏平衡点，并可能预示着加密货币牛市的恢复。

items.title: Bitcoin analysis sees $68K support as gold slips at key $5K level
items.summary: Bitcoin consolidated recent gains in the face of blanket skepticism over its rebound, while gold threatened to give up $5,000 support.
items.title_cn: 比特币分析显示6.8万美元支撑位，黄金在关键5000美元水平承压
items.summary_cn: 比特币在普遍对其反弹持怀疑态度的背景下巩固近期涨幅，而黄金则面临失守5000美元支撑位的风险。

items.title: Ethereum aims to cut bridge times by 98% to 13 seconds with new rule
items.summary: Ethereum’s FCR aims to reduce bridge times by up to 98%, bringing L1-to-L2 and exchange deposits down to 13 seconds without a hard fork.
items.title_cn: 以太坊计划通过新规则将跨链桥时间缩短98%至13秒
items.summary_cn: 以太坊的FCR旨在将跨链桥时间缩短高达98%，使L1到L2和交易所存款时间降至13秒，且无需硬分叉。

items.title: Vitalik Buterin promotes an update simplifying Ethereum node software
items.summary: The blockchain co-founder said the goal is to make the "self-sovereign" method of Ethereum users running their own nodes a user-friendly experience.
items.title_cn: Vitalik Buterin推广简化以太坊节点软件的更新
items.summary_cn: 这位区块链联合创始人表示，目标是让以太坊用户运行自己节点的“自主主权”方法成为用户友好的体验。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation sells $10.2M worth of ETH to BitMine in OTC deal
items.summary: The Ethereum Foundation completed a $10.2 million OTC sale of 5,000 ETH to BitMine as part of its treasury management strategy to fund operations and ecosystem development.
items.title_cn: 以太坊基金会通过场外交易向BitMine出售价值1020万美元的ETH
items.summary_cn: 以太坊基金会完成了向BitMine场外出售5000枚ETH（价值1020万美元）的交易，作为其资金管理和生态系统发展战略的一部分。

items.title: Bitmine speeds pace of Ethereum buys, boosting treasury to 4.6M ETH
items.summary: About two-thirds of the company’s tokens are currently staked, generating an estimated $180 million in annualized revenue.
items.title_cn: Bitmine加快以太坊购买步伐，将国库增至460万枚ETH
items.summary_cn: 该公司约三分之二的代币目前处于质押状态，预计年化收入达1.8亿美元。

items.title: Three Ethereum indicators hint that $2.8K is the next ETH price target
items.summary: A symmetrical triangle breakout and an unresolved supply overhang are boosting the case that Ether may go as high as $2,800 in March.
items.title_cn: 三个以太坊指标暗示2800美元为下一个ETH价格目标
items.summary_cn: 对称三角形突破和未解决的供应过剩问题增强了以太币在三月可能升至2800美元的预期。

items.title: Morning Minute: The SEC & CFTC Declare 'Most Crypto Assets' Are Not Securities
items.summary: After a decade of lawsuits, the SEC and CFTC finally wrote the rules for digital assets.
items.title_cn: 晨间快讯：SEC与CFTC宣布“大多数加密资产”不属于证券
items.summary_cn: 经过十年诉讼，SEC和CFTC终于为数字资产制定了规则。

items.title: Forget AGI—Top AI Models Still Struggle With Math
items.summary: New benchmark study results show leading AI models still lag humans in visual math reasoning.
items.title_cn: 忘掉AGI——顶级AI模型在数学方面仍举步维艰
items.summary_cn: 新基准研究结果显示，领先的AI模型在视觉数学推理方面仍落后于人类。

items.title: XRP Derivatives Market Signals Reset as Leverage Falls and Calls Lead
items.summary: XRP trades at $1.51 on Wednesday, with derivatives data pointing to a market that is cooling off after months of leverage-heavy positioning. Futures, funding rates and options flows suggest traders are dialing back risk—but not abandoning conviction. XRP Open Interest Drops as Options Traders Cluster Around $1.60 Strike Leverage across major venues is notably lower […]
items.title_cn: XRP衍生品市场信号重置：杠杆下降，看涨期权占主导
items.summary_cn: 周三XRP交易价格为1.51美元，衍生品数据显示市场在数月杠杆重仓后正在降温。期货、资金利率和期权流向表明交易者正在降低风险，但并未放弃信念。XRP未平仓合约下降，期权交易者聚集。

items.title: Credit Ratings Meet Blockchain: Moody’s Deploys TIE on Canton Network
items.summary: Moody’s Ratings has taken its credit analysis onchain, planting a flag in blockchain finance with a new integration engine designed to deliver ratings data directly into digital market infrastructure. Moody’s Brings Credit Ratings Onchain With Canton Network Integration Moody’s Corporation announced this week that it launched its Token Integration Engine (TIE), a network-agnostic system that […]
items.title_cn: 信用评级遇上区块链：穆迪在Canton网络上部署TIE
items.summary_cn: 穆迪评级已将信用分析上链，通过新的集成引擎将评级数据直接输入数字市场基础设施，在区块链金融领域树立了旗帜。穆迪通过Canton网络集成将信用评级上链。

items.title: Royal Government of Bhutan Moves 973 BTC in Latest Treasury Activity
items.summary: The Royal Government of Bhutan transferred 973 bitcoin worth about $72.3 million over March 17–18, reflecting continued sovereign treasury management rather than abrupt liquidation. Bhutan Continues Bitcoin Sales Strategy With 973 BTC Transfer The transactions, executed through state-owned Druk Holding & Investments (DHI), unfolded across roughly 24 hours, with bitcoin trading near $74,268 during the […]
items.title_cn: 不丹皇家政府转移973枚BTC，展现最新国库活动
items.summary_cn: 不丹皇家政府在3月17日至18日期间转移了价值约7230万美元的973枚比特币，反映了持续的国库管理策略，而非突然清算。不丹继续比特币销售策略，转移973枚BTC。

items.title: Maestro Launches Bitcoin-Native Institutional Credit Market for Mining Infrastructure
items.summary: Maestro has introduced Mezzamine, an onchain credit market enabling institutional investors to generate bitcoin yield through renewable mining operations. Maestro launched Mezzamine on March 17th, 2026, in Austin, Texas, debuting its first live program with the renewable energy provider Sazmining. The Bitcoin-native ( BTC) facility allows institutional holders to finance mining hashrate to earn an […]
items.title_cn: Maestro推出比特币原生机构信贷市场，支持挖矿基础设施
items.summary_cn: Maestro推出了Mezzanine，这是一个链上信贷市场，使机构投资者能够通过可再生能源挖矿操作产生比特币收益。Maestro于2026年3月17日在德克萨斯州奥斯汀推出Mezzanine，并与可再生能源提供商Sazmining合作启动首个实时项目。

items.title: UK Panel Calls Crypto Donations 'High Risk,' Seeks Immediate Ban
items.summary: A cross-party committee has warned that cryptocurrency donations leave UK politics open to foreign interference.

items.title: Bitcoin Depot Flags Control 'Weaknesses' as Connecticut Halts Its Operations

items.title: Democrats Press Meta Over Facial Recognition Plans for Smart Glasses
items.summary: Lawmakers are citing privacy risks tied to wearable AI and are asking how Meta intends to secure consent from both users and bystanders.

items.title: Mortgage refinance demand plunges 19% after interest rates shoot higher
items.summary: Mortgage rates shot higher last week, as the war with Iran stoked fears over inflation. That caused a major drop in refinance demand, but buyer demand improved.

ai_summary.en:
**🌍 Global Macro & Liquidity**: Macro environment shows mixed signals. Layer 1 indicates restrictive Fed policy (Fed Futures at 3.64% implied rate, 'Restrictive' zone) and high yields (US10Y at 4.2%), suggesting tight liquidity. However, VIX has dropped significantly (-19.64% over 5 days) indicating fear is subsiding, and Yen weakness (Japan Carrier Trade) signals some risk appetite. Layer 2 news is neutral-to-bearish with regulatory uncertainty (SEC/CFTC declaring most crypto not securities) and weak economic data (mortgage demand plunging). Overall, macro remains restrictive but fear is decreasing, creating potential for cautious risk-taking.

**🟠 BTC Strategy (Contract Only)**:
* **Signal**: PROBE
* **Reality Check**: BTC shows neutral technicals with ADX at 40.5 (strong trend), RSI at 49.7 (neutral), and MACD negative (-212). Funding is slightly positive (0.000005), OI delta is positive (+1.08%), and long liquidations ($7.04M) significantly exceed shorts ($1.57M). Lower wick exhaustion is high at 64.7%, suggesting strong buying at bottoms. The combination of high lower wick exhaustion, positive OI delta, and retail long pain suggests potential for bounce, but restrictive macro limits upside.

**🔷 ETH Strategy**:
* **Signal**: WAIT
* **Reality Check**: Layer 2 news is positive (Ethereum bridge improvements, Vitalik updates) but whale reality contradicts this bullish narrative. Whale sentiment is neutral (0.0) with low confidence (45.9), and critically, token net flow is NEGATIVE (-1,936,383 ETH) while stablecoin net flow is also negative (-$13M), indicating distribution. Technicals show ADX at 48.4 (strong trend), RSI at 55.6 (neutral-bullish), but MACD is negative (-9.3658). Long liquidations are high ($14.7M vs $1.6M shorts), and lower wick exhaustion is 46.7%. The divergence between positive news and negative whale flow suggests waiting for confirmation.
* **Key Metric**: Negative token net flow (-1,936,383 ETH) despite positive news - whales are distributing, not accumulating.

**🟣 SOL Strategy**:
* **Signal**: OBSERVE
* **Reality Check**: Whale sentiment is slightly negative (-0.1) with low confidence (44.9). Token net flow is POSITIVE (+170,063 SOL) while stablecoin flow is negative (-$197,189), suggesting potential selling pressure. Technicals show ADX at 36.2 (moderate trend), RSI at 48.3 (neutral), MACD negative (-0.4267). Long liquidations ($1.13M) exceed shorts ($225k) but are relatively small. Lower wick exhaustion is only 15.5%, suggesting limited buying pressure at bottoms. News is neutral (same regulatory headlines as general crypto). The combination of positive token flow (bearish), negative sentiment, and neutral technicals suggests observing for clearer direction.
* **Key Metric**: Positive token net flow (+170,063 SOL) with negative stablecoin flow - potential distribution signal.

**BNB Context**:
* **Signal**: OBSERVE
* **Reality Check**: Price rank is low (13.5/100), RSI at 44.4 (approaching oversold), MACD negative (-2.0888). Long liquidations ($50,958) far exceed shorts ($244). Lower wick exhaustion is 19.1%. No whale flow data available. Technicals suggest potential oversold conditions but need confirmation.

**DOGE Context**:
* **Signal**: OBSERVE
* **Reality Check**: L/S account ratio is bullish (1.54) but position ratio is bearish (0.86). RSI at 44.3 (approaching oversold), MACD negative (-0.0006). Long liquidations ($2.57M) exceed shorts ($412k). Lower wick exhaustion is 37.0%. No whale sentiment data. Mixed signals with some oversold characteristics.
ai_summary.zh:
**🌍 全球宏观与流动性**: 宏观环境呈现混合信号。第一层数据显示美联储政策限制性（联邦基金期货隐含利率3.64%，处于“限制性”区间）和收益率高企（美国10年期国债收益率4.2%），表明流动性紧张。然而，VIX指数大幅下降（5天内-19.64%）表明市场恐慌情绪正在消退，日元走弱（日本套利交易）显示一定的风险偏好。第二层新闻中性偏负面，存在监管不确定性（SEC/CFTC宣布大多数加密货币不是证券）和经济数据疲软（抵押贷款需求骤降）。总体而言，宏观环境仍具限制性，但恐慌情绪正在减少，为谨慎的风险承担创造了可能。

**🟠 BTC策略（仅合约）**:
* **信号**: 试探
* **现实检验**: BTC技术指标中性，ADX为40.5（趋势强劲），RSI为49.7（中性），MACD为负值（-212）。资金费率略微为正（0.000005），未平仓合约变化为正（+1.08%），多头清算（704万美元）显著超过空头（157万美元）。下影线耗尽高达64.7%，表明底部有强劲买盘。高下影线耗尽、正未平仓合约变化以及散户多头亏损的组合表明可能存在反弹，但限制性宏观环境限制了上行空间。

**🔷 ETH策略**:
* **信号**: 等待
* **现实检验**: 第二层新闻积极（以太坊桥接改进、Vitalik更新），但鲸鱼现实与这一看涨叙事相矛盾。鲸鱼情绪中性（0.0），信心较低（45.9），关键的是，代币净流量为负（-1,936,383 ETH），而稳定币净流量也为负（-1300万美元），表明正在分发。技术指标显示ADX为48.4（趋势强劲），RSI为55.6（中性偏看涨），但MACD为负（-9.3658）。多头清算较高（1470万美元对比160万美元空头），下影线耗尽为46.7%。积极新闻与负面鲸鱼流量之间的分歧表明需要等待确认。
* **关键指标**: 尽管新闻积极，但代币净流量为负（-1,936,383 ETH）——鲸鱼在分发而非积累。

**🟣 SOL策略**:
* **信号**: 观察
* **现实检验**: 鲸鱼情绪略微负面（-0.1），信心较低（44.9）。代币净流量为正（+170,063 SOL），而稳定币流量为负（-197,189美元），表明可能存在抛售压力。技术指标显示ADX为36.2（趋势中等），RSI为48.3（中性），MACD为负（-0.4267）。多头清算（113万美元）超过空头（22.5万美元）但相对较小。下影线耗尽仅为15.5%，表明底部买盘压力有限。新闻中性（与一般加密货币相同的监管头条）。正代币流量（看跌）、负面情绪和中性技术指标的组合表明需要观察更明确的方向。
* **关键指标**: 正代币净流量（+170,063 SOL）伴随负稳定币流量——潜在的分发信号。

**BNB背景**:
* **信号**: 观察
* **现实检验**: 价格排名较低（13.5/100），RSI为44.4（接近超卖），MACD为负（-2.0888）。多头清算（50,958美元）远超空头（244美元）。下影线耗尽为19.1%。无鲸鱼流量数据。技术指标表明可能存在超卖情况但需要确认。

**DOGE背景**:
* **信号**: 观察
* **现实检验**: 多空账户比率看涨（1.54）但仓位比率看跌（0.86）。RSI为44.3（接近超卖），MACD为负（-0.0006）。多头清算（257万美元）超过空头（41.2万美元）。下影线耗尽为37.0%。无鲸鱼情绪数据。信号混合，具有一些超卖特征。
